recommended_script_absorption: Promote run_eight_organ_sweep.py into COMMON_AGENT_CLI with parameterized organ-command matrix.
future_prompt_improvements: Include explicit alias commands for Administratum and Officio in taskpack to avoid shell syntax ambiguity.
Include strict acceptance matrix field names required by Officio task-acceptance-check.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add pre-sweep command syntax lint for `/shell --once` adapters.
Add checklist item for rich fallback warnings expectedness so WARN volume is interpreted correctly.
missing_tools: Dedicated built-in multi-organ sweep runner for identity/rich-shell tasks in COMMON_AGENT_CLI.
waste_points: Initial sweep used `help` instead of `/help` for Administratum shell once-command and caused avoidable BLOCKER classification.
